title: Smoke-Nut Delight
description: A savory and dense Ukrainian dish featuring peanuts in a dairy-free, smoke-infused sauce, perfect for solo dining or as a light meal.

ingredients.name: Dairy-Free Milk or Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Almond, soy, or oat milk can be used as alternatives.

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: Choose mild or medium smoked paprika based on preference

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: A pinch more for a saltier dish, or less to keep it savory without being overpowering.

instructions: Place peanuts in a bowl and coat them with soy sauce, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and filtered water. Mix well until all peanuts are coated.
Transfer the peanut mixture to a baking dish or shallow pan. Ensure they are evenly distributed over the surface.
Preheat your oven to 200°C (392°F). Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for about 15-20 minutes, shaking occasionally until peanuts are golden brown and crisp.

Remove from heat and allow it to cool down slightly. Once cooled enough, you can mix a portion of the cooked peanut mixture with milk or other dairy-free milk alternative into a sauce. Stir well until smooth and creamy.
Serve the smoked peanut sauce over noodles or as a side dish, garnished with fresh herbs like parsley for added freshness.
